# HardAssets.io robots.txt
# Allow landing page for SEO
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /app
Disallow: /mobile
Disallow: /api/

Sitemap: https://hardassets.io/sitemap.xml

# Block AI scrapers from dashboard and API routes only
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /app
Disallow: /mobile
Disallow: /api/
